use_cases: Display feature comparison across multiple pricing tiers side-by-side
Help users evaluate plan differences with visual checkmarks
Enable users to select appropriate subscription based on included features
Present pricing information in organized, scannable format
Support yearly/monthly pricing toggle with cost display
ai_summary: A clean, responsive pricing comparison table component that displays multiple subscription plans side-by-side with their features. Features are marked with checkmarks based on inclusion level (starter/pro/all), and plans include pricing information with optional popular badge. Supports sticky header positioning and dark mode styling.
